features: FIZZ TIME: Elysium Spa Bath Bombs are an instant relaxing, refreshing, zingy addition to any bath. Simply drop in the bath, watch them fizz and enjoy a fragrant, relaxing soak.
DELICIOUSLY SCENTED: Enjoy the fabulous scent of a gentle rose whilst relaxing in a warm bath.
BATH TRIO: Each resealable pack contains three scented bath bombs. Enjoy multiple silky smooth vanilla sugar scented baths.

BUBBLE FREE: Prefer the perfect scented, silky water to relax into? Bath bombs are the perfect addition to your bath, easy to use, just add water, drop the bath bomb, watch it fizz and release the gentle vanilla sugar fragrance. Relax and enjoy.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Resealable bag. Ready to use, triple pack.
description: Product Description Elysium Spa Bath Bombs are an instant relaxing, refreshing, zingy addition to any bath. Simply drop in the bath, watch them fizz and enjoy a fragrant, relaxing soak.
